feat.name: Night Magic
feat.text: You can tap into the magic that runs through your blood. You gain *animal form* (wolf only, using the statistics for a canine) and *mist* as 2nd-rank divine innate spells. You can cast each of these spells once per day.

traits.name: Dhampir
traits.text: A creature with this trait has the dhampir versatile heritage. These humanoids are the offspring of vampires and members of other ancestries.
